equals(Object) - Method in class io.goobi.viewer.model.search.SearchSortingOption
Two SearchSortingOptions are equal if they either both have an empty SearchSortingOption.getField() or if both SearchSortingOption.getField() and SearchSortingOption.isAscending() are equal.

ExcelRenderer - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.annotation.export
Renders CrowdsourcingAnnotation records into an XLSX workbook, grouping annotations by sheet name and writing one row per annotation with columns for ID, record, page, campaign, author, and body value.

ExternalFilesDownloader - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.files.external
Downloads files or ZIP archives from remote URIs to a local target directory, with optional decryption and progress tracking.
ExternalFilesDownloader(Path, Consumer<Progress>) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.files.external.ExternalFilesDownloader
 
ExternalFilesDownloadJob - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.job.download
Value object representing the state of an in-progress or completed external file download job, including download progress, target path, message ID, and any error description.

ExternalImageResource - Class in io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.v1.media
REST resource for accessing externally-hosted images referenced in digitized records.
ExternalImageResource - Class in io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.v2.media
REST resource for accessing externally-hosted images via the v2 IIIF image service.
